author: abaybektursun
name: Scylla + Parallel Residuals + Mini Depth Recurrence + Legal TTT
blurb: Built on our PRs #549 (LeakyReLU² + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon) and #1019 (AR Self-Gen GPTQ + XSA-all). Adds Scylla tokenizer (PR #1143, @simon-marcus), parallel residual routing from layer 7 (PR #1204, @msisovic), mini depth recurrence on layers 4,5 with untied MLPs (PR #1204), mixed INT5/INT6 quantization + brotli compression, n-gram two-pass rescoring, and legal score-first TTT. 3-seed exact mean: 1.08759808 BPB / 1.94685549 nats.
calibration: No GPTQ — mixed INT5 (MLP middle layers) + INT6 (attn + sensitive MLP) per-row quantization
technique_summary: Scylla tokenizer (998 vocab) + parallel residuals (layer 7+) + mini depth recurrence (layers 4,5 untied MLP) + legal score-first TTT (lr=0.005, 3 epochs) + n-gram two-pass + mixed INT5/INT6 + brotli
